briefdescription.para: This definitions specify the EXTRA bytes in each of the command transactions.

detaileddescription.para: This count includes Command byte, address bytes and any don't care bytes needed.

briefdescription.para: This function enables writes to the Numonyx Serial Flash memory.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables writes to the Winbond Serial Flash memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSpi *SpiPtr, u32 Addr, u32 ByteCount, u8 WriteCmd)
memberdef.name: SpiFlashWrite

briefdescription.para: This function writes the data to the specified locations in the Numonyx Serial Flash memory.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the data to the specified locations in the Winbond Serial Flash memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.
is the address in the Buffer, where to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be written.
is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.
is the address in the Buffer, where to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be written.
is the command used for writing data to flash.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSpi *SpiPtr, u32 Addr, u32 ByteCount, u8 ReadCmd)
memberdef.name: SpiFlashRead

briefdescription.para: This function reads the data from the Numonyx Serial Flash Memory.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the data from the Winbond Serial Flash Memory.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.
is the starting address in the Flash Memory from which the data is to be read.
is the number of bytes to be read.
is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.
is the starting address in the Flash Memory from which the data is to be read.
is the number of bytes to be read.
is the command used for reading data from flash.

briefdescription.para: This function erases the entire contents of the Numonyx Serial Flash device.

detaileddescription.para: This function erases the entire contents of the Winbond Serial Flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.

simplesect.para: The erased bytes will read as 0xFF.

briefdescription.para: This function erases the contents of the specified Sector in the Numonyx Serial Flash device.

detaileddescription.para: This function erases the contents of the specified Sector in the Winbond Serial Flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.
is the address within a sector of the Buffer, which is to be erased.

simplesect.para: The erased bytes will be read back as 0xFF.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Status register of the Numonyx Flash.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Status register of the Winbond Flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.

simplesect.para: The status register content is stored at the second byte pointed by the ReadBuffer.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the QuadEnable bit in Winbond flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.

briefdescription.para: This function enabled High Performance Mode in Winbond flash, so that data can be read from the flash using DIO and QIO commands.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the Spi device.

briefdescription.para: This function waits till the Numonyx serial Flash is ready to accept next command.

simplesect.para: This function reads the status register of the Buffer and waits . till the WIP bit of the status register becomes 0.

briefdescription.para: This function is the handler which performs processing for the SPI driver.

detaileddescription.para: It is called from an interrupt context such that the amount of processing performed should be minimized. It is called when a transfer of SPI data completes or an error occurs.
This handler provides an example of how to handle SPI interrupts and is application specific.

parameterdescription.para: is the upper layer callback reference passed back when the callback function is invoked.
is the event that just occurred.
is the number of bytes transferred up until the event occurred.

briefdescription.para: Main function to run the quad flash example.
This file contains a design example using the SPI driver (XSpi) and axi_qspi device with a Numonyx quad serial flash device in the interrupt mode.

detaileddescription.para: This example erases a Sector, writes to a Page within the Sector, reads back from that Page and compares the data.
This example has been tested with an N25Q128 device on KC705 and ZC770 board. The bytes per page (PAGE_SIZE) in N25Q128 is 256.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a bss 08/08/12 First release 3.04a bss 02/11/13 Modified to use ScuGic in case of Zynq (CR#683510) 4.2 ms 01/23/17 Added xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. ms 04/05/17 Modified Comment lines to follow doxygen rules. 4.11 sb 07/11/23 Added support for system device-tree flow.
